problem: scripts/validate-repo.ps1 resolved the repository root as A:\Codex instead of the project folder. After that defect was corrected, the script still referenced two stale workflow filenames.
fix: Resolve the repository root as the parent of the scripts directory, fail fast if FORSETTI_CONSTITUTION.md is not found, and align required workflow filenames with the current repository.
